---

**Thresholds:**
- SEO titles: min 25 chars
- SEO descriptions: min 120 chars
- SEO keywords: min 40 chars
- Descriptions: min 80 chars; short 15; long 120
- specifications_notes: must contain SHORT SPECS, FULL SPECS, TECHNICIAN SPECS
